class.name: hermes_motor_base/HermesHardware
class.description:
ros2_control SystemInterface plugin for the HERMES differential-drive robot. Controls two DC motors via the TB6612FNG dual H-bridge motor driver over Linux GPIO (libgpiod v1). Suitable for Raspberry Pi and similar single-board computers.
Since the robot has no wheel encoders, the read() method integrates commanded velocities to produce an open-loop wheel-position estimate that the diff_drive_controller uses for odometry.
